name: Bright Data
api_notes: The API surface is broad, covering proxy management, web scraping, search (SERP), datasets, and specialized unlockers, available via REST endpoints and official SDKs for Python and JavaScript/TypeScript.
one_liner: Bright Data is an enterprise-grade platform providing proxy networks, web scraping APIs, and structured web data collection services.

evidence.claim: Bright Data is an all-in-one platform for proxies and web scraping, offering data extraction and web access APIs.
The Bright Data Scraper Studio API uses Bearer token authentication.
Bright Data provides an official MCP server to connect AI models to real-time web data.
A free tier is available for Bright Data accounts with API access.

mcp_notes: Bright Data provides an official MCP server to facilitate AI integration with their web data, search, and scraping tools.
access_notes: Developers can sign up for a free account with free monthly credits without a credit card. API access is available to these accounts.
auth_notes: Authentication typically uses an API Token/Key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
